title: LINGUISTICS. LINGUISTIC METHODS AND ITS SECTIONS

keywords: linguistics, private linguistics, fragmentary method, ethnolinguistics, psycholinguistics, historical-comparative method, substitution method, distributive method, component method, transformational method, statistical analysis method, phonetic-phonological level, lexical level, a method of meaning scale analysis.
